text.title: gemini-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for gemini-basics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Mixing sync model.generate_content() and async model.generate_content_async() in the same script.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: They use different event loop implementations; this causes RuntimeError: This event loop is already running. Pick one pattern and stick to it.

failure-mode.description: Rebuilding chat history from scratch for each message instead of persisting the chat object.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Rebuilding discards prior context, forcing you to re-include prior messages in each new prompt. This wastes tokens and breaks natural conversation flow.

failure-mode.description: Assuming ResourceExhausted errors on the free tier are transient and will resolve with retries.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Free tier daily quotas are hard limits; once exceeded, no amount of backoff helps. Check when quota resets and wait until then, or upgrade to paid tier.
